mapper.sql: id, test_plan_id, project_id, content, content_type, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.select:
select
from test_plan_document where id = #{id} limit 1

select
from test_plan_document where test_plan_id = #{testPlanId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into test_plan_document (id, test_plan_id, project_id, content, content_type, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{contentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
